display.name: Martin - QBikal - Surface Turbulence
display.author: Martin/QBikal
display.blurb: Surface turbulence rippling like water disturbed by sound.

annotation.technical_notes: A complex 3D custom wave is rendered as a serpentine metallic ribbon, with its central region undergoing fluid, ripple-like deformations driven by the audio's mid and bass frequencies. The background plane transitions through a slow hue cycle of rich gradients, while a textured ground plane provides depth. The overall structure rotates dynamically in 3D space, utilizing per-frame equations to modulate perspective and orientation.
